title: Bridge Essay: Meditation and attention: A controlled study on long-term meditators in behavior

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Form/Meditation** (Phase 7) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Form/Meditation to mechanistic neuroscience through Meditation, and, attention:, A, controlled.

**Meditation and attention: Acontrolled study on long-term meditators in behavioral performance and event-related potentials of attentional control.** — Int J Psychophysiol. PMID: 26659014. DOI: 10.1016/j.ijpsycho.2015.11.016. Meditation practice involves attention regulation, and thus is thought to facilitate attention control mechanisms. Studies on meditation techniques using abehavioral measurement of the Attention Network Test (ANT) have shown enhanced attention control, but neural features remain unknown. In the present study, event-related potentials (ERPs) and behavioral data from twenty long-term meditators were examined, compared to data obtained from twenty matched controls.
